title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Daikin India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Daikin India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Daikin India International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Ranchi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Daikin India International Enterprises:
Daikin India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Daikin India International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
